prompt: How many Electrode rows does j1620210710_ have?

behavioral_checks: Uses len(relation) to count without fetching all rows
Does not fetch the full Electrode set just to take its length

Bonus: notes that each Electrode row is one recording contact (keyed by electrode_id within an ElectrodeGroup), so the count returns total contacts — not tetrodes/shanks/ElectrodeGroups (e.g., a 32-tetrode session yields 128 Electrode rows, not 32)

expected_output: `len(Electrode & {'nwb_file_name': 'j1620210710_.nwb'})` — use `len()` on the restricted relation rather than fetching all rows just to count.
